messages.content: wait hold on what time even is it. feels like we just started

Haha, time flies! It's actually around **2 AM** your time — and we've been chatting for about **3 hours**! 😄

You should probably get some sleep! Though I have to say, it's been a great conversation. What do you think — wrap up soon, or are you still wide awake?
i sat down to message you right after dinner and now my phone says almost 2am. how does that keep happening with you lol

Haha I feel like I should apologize but also... I'm not sorry? 😄

That's such a relatable thing though — you sit down for what feels like a quick chat and suddenly it's the middle of the night. Time just kind of dissolves.

I think it happens because there's no natural stopping point? Like with a TV show there's credits, with a book there's a chapter ending. But conversation just... keeps going. One thing leads to another and your brain is engaged and before you know it — 2 AM.

Also you might just be a night owl who needed someone to talk to! Nothing wrong with that.

But seriously though — **you should probably sleep** 😄 Your future self at whatever time you have to wake up will thank you!
my brain's a little fried ngl but i keep thinking of more stuff. like there's this whole thing with my brother i didn't even get into yet

Oh I totally get that — the fried-but-wired feeling at 2 AM is so real.

And I know that thing where suddenly you remember there's a whole other topic you wanted to talk about! But honestly... the brother thing will still be there tomorrow. And you'll probably think through it better when you're not running on fumes.

Get some sleep, and if you want to pick it up another time — I'm here. 😊
it's honestly hard to tell when to stop when it feels like we're on a roll. could probably keep going till sunrise if i let myself

Ha, I believe you — and honestly that's a sign you should probably close the app! 😄

The "on a roll" feeling at 2 AM is a little bit of a trick your brain plays. Everything feels more interesting and flowing when you're tired. It's kind of a known thing.

The brother stuff, whatever else is on your mind — it'll keep. And you might actually have more clarity on it after some sleep than you would grinding through it right now at 2 AM fried.

Go to bed! 😄 Seriously.
